name: Inside the Mansion
description:
Finally! You are out of that terrifying garden. The nightmare seems to have  
finish, but when you decide to look at in your turn...  
The door that you could escape from within of the Mansion closes.  
Noises begin to leave for the walls, people's sounds being in death agony...  
Now, you are inside of the Mansion.

extra_descriptions.description:
Dark Mansion
       ============

  Inside there we do not have mercy.
  Stay here, and pray for yourself soul.
                Mhuahahahaha!
